name: OVO
description: OVO — Indonesia digital wallet by Tokopedia group supporting QR payments, transfers, and merchant API integration.

seo.title: OVO — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: OVO: OVO — Indonesia digital wallet by Tokopedia group supporting QR payments, transfers, and merchant API integration.

when_to_use: Accepting OVO wallet payments for Indonesian e-commerce
QR-based checkout integration for Tokopedia ecosystem merchants
Recurring top-up integrations for Indonesian loyalty programs

pros: Native QR and in-app wallet support
cons: Docs partly in Indonesian, English thin
Enterprise onboarding, slow for small merchants
review.verdict: Unavoidable if you sell to Indonesian consumers, but expect a localized onboarding and sparse English docs.
review.best_for: Merchants targeting Indonesian consumers via Tokopedia ecosystem and QR wallets
review.not_for: Developers wanting plug-and-play global APIs with polished English docs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
